# AUR packages installed via yay on Manjaro / Arch.
# install.sh bootstraps yay from AUR git if it's missing.
# One package per line. Lines starting with # or blank lines are ignored.
1password
google-chrome
brave-bin
insync
cursor-bin
visual-studio-code-bin
lando
# Moved from official repos (dropped/relocated on current Arch/Manjaro):
xautolock
nitrogen
moc-pulse-svn
